paper_focus.title: Deformation behaviour of iron-rich iron-aluminum alloys at low temperatures
paper_focus.research_objective: To clarify the dependence of strength and ductility on Al content and short-range ordering in binary Fe-Al alloys (up to 18 at.% Al) at low temperatures, and to identify the relative contributions of solid-solution hardening, quenched-in excess vacancies, and short-range ordering.
main_process_variables: heat treatment: quenching from 1100 °C, annealing at 300–600 °C
